_meta.purpose: Solver correctness validation fixtures — competitive decklists for benchmarking combo finding against known meta archetypes

ddd-wcq-top4.source: ygoprodeck.com — D/D/D, Top 4 Cali WCQ Regional (John Ramírez Barberi, 2025-12-07)

ryzeal-mitsurugi-hk-top8.source: ygoprodeck.com — Mitsurugi Ryzeal, Top 8 Yu-Gi-Oh! Open Tournament Hong Kong 2026 AE (Tu Kai-Hsiang, 2026-03-23)

branded-dracotail-bainbridge-2nd.source: ygoprodeck.com — Branded Dracotail, 2nd Place Bainbridge WCQ Regional

nekroz-ryzeal-jan2026-tcg-1st.source: ygoprodeck.com — 1st Place Undefeated Nekroz Ryzeal (Jan. 2026 TCG Format)
nekroz-ryzeal-jan2026-tcg-1st.notes: Added 2026-04-17 for step 2 Phase 1. Ritual archetype fixture — validates F1 Ritual Unlock Co-Presence generalization beyond Mitsurugi Prayers. Nekroz uses distinct ritual spells (Kaleidoscope, Cycle, Mirror) and distinct ritual monsters (Brionac, Trishula, Unicore, Areadbhair). Ryzeal engine co-presence is incidental (hybrid tournament build); F1 signal isolates on Nekroz-specific ritual metadata. Aliases normalized: Bagooska 90590304→90590303, Harpie's Feather Duster 18144507→18144506.

radiant-typhoon-ygoprodeck-2026.notes: Control deck paradigm — coverage of non-combo endboard (3 cards vs typical 5-6). Opener + endboard validated by user 2026-04-15.

yummy-pure-striker-2026.source: ygoprodeck.com — Yummy (Synchro Festival variant adapted with Herald of the Arc Light for canonical combo endboard)
yummy-pure-striker-2026.notes: DRAFT — DO NOT INCLUDE IN BASELINE MATCHED AGGREGATION. Yummy pure combo fixture — Herald of the Arc Light swapped into Extra (replaces 1 Goyo Defender) to enable the canonical 6-card endboard. Combo source: ygo101 image 2c5615c3. KNOWN ISSUE (2026-04-15 smoke test): opener [Lollipo + 4 handtraps] does NOT execute the combo — DFS terminates at 3 plies because the Sky Striker engine (Hornet Drones + Engage + Kagari) is absent from this deck and the combo requires a Link-1 token for the chain. Fixture needs either (a) Sky Striker engine added to main/extra, or (b) different opener that truly works 1-card from Lollipo alone. Score 1 / matched 0/6.

_meta.usage: Solver correctness validation. Decklists extracted from ygoprodeck.com HTML (data-card attributes) and validated against duel-server/data/cards.cdb. Alias IDs normalized to canonical IDs (Ash Blossom 14558128→14558127, Harpie's Feather Duster 18144507→18144506). Feed hands to the DFS/MCTS solver and compare computed endBoardCards against expected boards.
_meta.expectedBoards: Populated per hand with human-confirmed target boards. Each hand entry has an 'expectedBoard' field listing { zone, cardId, cardName } entries that the solver should reproduce. These are curated, not auto-generated — treat as golden references.

hands.description: D/D/D Pendulum opener: Savant Kepler + Savant Copernicus + Scale Surveyor + Dark Contract with the Gate + Mulcharmy Fuwalos. Canonical 1-card Gate combo produces the FULL endboard: Deus Machinex+1 contract, Wave High King Caesar, Cursed King Siegfried, Sky King Zeus Ragnarok, Headhunt. See ddd-combo-reference.md.
Mitsurugi+Ryzeal opener: Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi + Ice Ryzeal + Sword Ryzeal + Mitsurugi Prayers + Mulcharmy Fuwalos. Expected to set up Rank 4 Xyz plus Mitsurugi control shell.

Radiant Typhoon opener (validated 2026-04-15): Eldam + Chant + Krosea + Vision + Mulcharmy Fuwalos. Control deck paradigm — 3-card endboard (vs 5-6 for combo decks). Expected: Totem Bird (Rank 3 Xyz, summon denial via bounce) + Hraesvelgr the Desperate Doom Eagle (Link 3) + Radiant Typhoon Mandate set (facedown Trap). This fixture validates the solver on non-combo control paradigm where the endboard has fewer cards but higher per-card disruption value.

DRAFT — Yummy pure combo opener. KNOWN BUG: with this opener [Lollipo + 4 handtraps] the DFS terminates at 3 plies and scores 1/6 matched because the Sky Striker engine (Hornet Drones + Kagari) is missing from the deck — required for the canonical Link-1 token generation feeding Cupsy★Yummy Way. Fixture must be revised (add Sky Striker engine OR change opener) before inclusion in baseline. Canonical combo source: ygo101 image 2c5615c3. Target 6-card endboard: Yummy★Snatchy (Link-1 EMZ) + Lollipo★Yummy Way (Synchro L2 MZONE) + Marshmao♦Yummy (MZONE) + Herald of the Arc Light (Synchro L4 MZONE omni-negate) + Yummy♦Surprise (trap set SZONE) + Yummyusment♦Mignon (field spell).

Branded Dracotail opener (Arthalion line): Dracotail Faimena + Dracotail Lukias + Fallen of the White Dragon + Branded Fusion + Blazing Cartesia. Expected to execute the Lukias-search-Mululu combo through Faimena fusion into Arthalion, chain-set Dracotail Flame/Horn/Sting via Lukias/Mululu GY-fusion-material triggers, then use Fallen of the White Dragon to special summon Ecclesia and the Dark Dragon. Pan was swapped out for Fallen of the White Dragon in the 2026-04-13 fixture audit — Pan needs a tribute and is dead in an opening hand.

Nekroz Ryzeal opener (Jan 2026 TCG): Emilia (Dance Priestess) + Avance (Swordsman) + Preparation of Rites + Mulcharmy Fuwalos + Ash Blossom. Added 2026-04-17 for step 2 Phase 1 — validates F1 Ritual Unlock Co-Presence generalization on Nekroz ritual engine (distinct from Mitsurugi Prayers). Expected: canonical 2026 Nekroz Ryzeal turn-1 endboard = Herald of the Arc Light (omni-negate Ritual Synchro L4) + Nekroz of Unicore (Extra-Deck floodgate ritual body) + Ryzeal Duo Drive (Rank 4 Xyz second threat) + Nekroz Kaleidoscope set via GY search trigger. Conservative 4-card endboard — matched secondary to structural score signal for F1 test.

Branded Dracotail opener (Mirrorjade line): same opening hand as branded-dracotail-opener, but expected to execute the alternate canonical line where Branded Fusion produces Lubellion → Mirrorjade the Iceblade Dragon instead of chain-setting the Dracotail trap package. Added 2026-04-14 after Phase A #3 SELECT_CARD exploratory revealed the solver naturally finds this variant via Lukias→Mululu→Branded Fusion→Lubellion→Mirrorjade→Devours the Dogma. Both lines are valid meta Branded Dracotail endboards; `matched` on EITHER fixture indicates canonical reach.
